spec_match.rationale: Excellent spec match covering action, eagerness, referrer policy, target_hint, and multiple URL source lists.

interactive.rationale: Incredible user interface featuring custom textareas, copy tools, and interactive live script injection/removal controls.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Accurately maps the Chromium compatibility matrix of targets.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully toggles list vs document matches depending on input states.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful compatibility table matching the showcase design systems.

summary: A first-class utility and interactive generator demonstrating custom speculation rules and supporting live head injection.
